headline: Stock Market Weekly Review: S&P 500, Nasdaq Below 50-Day Line; Micron, Apple In Focus
summary: The stock market was mixed, but the S&P 500 and Nasdaq are below their 50-day lines. Micron earnings soared on memory prices, which hit Apple.

headline: Carnival Corporation Ltd (CCL) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Profits and Strategic ...
summary: Carnival Corporation Ltd (CCL) reports a robust quarter with record net income and customer deposits, while navigating geopolitical headwinds and strategic expansions.
